steps.title: Choose the conversion direction
steps.content: The problem gives $1$ rod $=5.5$ yards. Since the question starts with rods and asks for yards, multiply by $5.5$ yards per rod.

steps.title: Set up the unit cancellation
steps.content:
$$77\text{ rods}\cdot\frac{5.5\text{ yards}}{1\text{ rod}}$$
The rod units cancel, leaving yards.
